paragraphs.text: 这是第2篇中级阅读文章。这篇文章将帮助你提高阅读理解能力。
paragraphs.translation: This is intermediate reading article 2. This article will help improve your reading comprehension.

paragraphs.text: 通过阅读不同主题的文章，你可以扩大词汇量，了解更多的文化知识。
paragraphs.translation: By reading articles on different topics, you can expand your vocabulary and learn more about culture.

paragraphs.text: 遇到不懂的词语，可以查字典或者根据上下文猜意思。坚持阅读，你的中文会越来越好！
paragraphs.translation: When you encounter unfamiliar words, you can look them up in a dictionary or guess the meaning from context. Keep reading, and your Chinese will get better and better!
